description_long: This is a Soviet-era military jet aircraft with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose cone, painted in a matte gray finish. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, giving the airplane a delta-like appearance. Red star insignias are visible on the wings and tail, indicating its origin and military use. The cockpit is positioned forward and features a single, enclosed canopy with a greenish tint. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all swept back to match the aerodynamic design.
description: A gray, swept-wing Soviet military jet with red star insignias, forward cockpit, and deployed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, swept wings, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear oblique view highlighting the jet exhaust, swept tail, and red star insignias on the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the fuselage, swept wings, and landing gear.
description_view_3: Front oblique view emphasizing the pointed nose, canopy, and the angular configuration of the wings and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and swept horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle configuration with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a bubble canopy.
